summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LorkERP Arabic accounting system. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), but frontend has critical React component import issues preventing dashboard from loading after login.

critical_bugs.issue: React component import errors - 'Element type is invalid: expected a string (for built-in components) or a class/function (for composite components) but got: undefined'
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents dashboard from loading after successful login
critical_bugs.root_cause: Missing or incorrect Lucide React icon imports

ui_bugs.issue: Login page loads correctly with beautiful Arabic RTL interface

integration_issues.issue: Login succeeds but dashboard fails to render due to component errors

issues: Arabic RTL interface is properly implemented

passed_tests: All CRUD operations for core entities
Frontend login page loads with Arabic RTL
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix React component import errors in Layout.js and Dashboard.js. The issue is with Lucide React icon imports causing 'Element type is invalid' errors. All backend APIs are working perfectly. The login page is beautiful and functional, but dashboard cannot render due to missing/incorrect component imports.
